achievements.title: Greased It On
achievements.description: Safely land an aircraft.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Astern, Ready
achievements.description: Conduct air-to-air refueling.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Buff Naked
achievements.description: Gun kill all B-52s and complete Skies of Deception in less than 2 minutes on Hard or Ace difficulty.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Turkey Shoot
achievements.description: Destroy all anti-aircraft systems on Out of the Fire within 45 seconds without using a missile on Hard or Ace difficulty.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Showboater
achievements.description: Fly underneath the vertical lift section of the Port Patterson Bridge at over 1,000 knots while it is lowered.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Hit the Deck
achievements.description: On Prelude, remain below 300' while south of the Port Patterson bridge and destroy all landing ships before they reach the port on Hard or Ace difficulty.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Surgery at 500 Knots
achievements.description: Complete Captive City without sustaining any damage or destroying any fuel tanks on Hard or Ace difficulty.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Melted the Barrels
achievements.description: Complete Last Line of Defense without employing any weapons besides the gun on Hard or Ace difficulty.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Skipped 'Em
achievements.description: Complete False Target without shooting down any enemy escort fighters on Hard or Ace difficulty.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Hunkered Down
achievements.description: Descend below 1000' within ten seconds of starting Rolling Thunder and complete the mission without climbing back above 1000' on Hard or Ace difficulty.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: FOB Raider
achievements.description: Destroy the Leasath staging base on Rolling Thunder on Hard or Ace difficulty.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Guardian Angel
achievements.description: Complete Pinned Down without any losses to Davis unit on Hard or Ace difficulty.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Eye on the Prize
achievements.description: Complete The Midnight Sun in less than three minutes without shooting down any enemy fighters on Hard or Ace difficulty.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Local Warming
achievements.description: Destroy the entire iceberg in Ice Bound within one second of initially damaging it on Hard or Ace difficulty.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Trading Shots
achievements.description: Gun kill all 11 AA Guns on Standoff in the Skies I on Hard or Ace difficulty.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Sucking Chest Wound
achievements.description: Gun kill the Gleipnir's shock cannon on Standoff in the Skies II on Hard or Ace difficulty.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: MOPP 4
achievements.description: Neutralize all cyrocrine plumes on Time Limit in less than two minutes and 15 seconds on Hard or Ace difficulty.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Fast and Furious
achievements.description: Complete Striking Point in less than four minutes on Hard or Ace difficulty.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Smoked a Lucky
achievements.description: Complete The Wasteland without employing any weapons beside the gun on Hard or Ace difficulty.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Hiding in Plain Sight
achievements.description: Pass through the radar net protecting Sachana Air Base on Blitz without destroying any gunboats in less than one minute and five seconds on Ace difficulty.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Walking Nine
achievements.description: Escort the CH-47s to Sachana Air Base on A Diversion without allowing them to take any damage on Hard or Ace difficulty.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Strafe Rags
achievements.description: Gun kill all three X-29's before they get airborne on A Diversion on Hard or Ace difficulty.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Tallyho
achievements.description: Shoot down five enemy fighters on Joint Operation on Hard or Ace difficulty.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: High Aspect Gun Shot
achievements.description: Gun kill one of the two MiG-31s at the start of Break In before merging on Ace difficulty.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Multirole Master
achievements.description: After the mission update on Break In, shoot down at least five enemy fighters and complete the mission before the train is half way to any factories on Hard or Ace difficulty.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Standoffish
achievements.description: Complete In Pursuit I or II without destroying any power stations on Hard or Ace difficulty.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Eeny Meeny Miny Moe
achievements.description: Knock out power to Nevera Jammer on In Pursuit I or II without destroying any decoy power stations on Hard or Ace difficulty.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Grüße, Max
achievements.description: Fly through the lowest hole in the Gaiuss Tower and do an Immelmann through the top hole without extending away from the tower.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Defanged
achievements.description: Destroy all eight Meson cannons on Gaiuss Tower on Hard or Ace difficulty.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: High Speed Cheerleader
achievements.description: Accelerate above 1,000 knots within 30 seconds and complete Atmos Ring without slowing down below 1,000 knots on Hard or Ace difficulty.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Golden Dome
achievements.description: Gun kill 15 surface-to-surface missiles on Wild Card on Hard or Ace difficulty.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Mow and Flow
achievements.description: Complete Alect Squadron without letting more than 30 seconds elapse between kills on Hard or Ace difficulty.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: ACM Standard
achievements.description: Defeat both named pilots on Armada on Hard or Ace difficulty.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Splash Three
achievements.description: On Fire Storm, shoot down the 3-ship defensive patrol within 45 seconds on Hard or Ace difficulty.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Midnight
achievements.description: Destroy all 12 radar sites on Offline in less than one minute and 15 seconds on Hard or Ace difficulty.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Calm, Cool, Collected
achievements.description: Shoot down the 4-ship of Fenrirs on End of Deception I without allowing the fuel temperature to increase on Hard or Ace difficulty.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Unknown Riders
achievements.description: Destroy all four unknown aircraft inside the base on End of Deception II.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Ace of Spades
achievements.description: Gun kill five enemy fighters on Operation X on Ace difficulty.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Comeuppance
achievements.description: Gun kill "Rose" with an F-4E on Hard or Ace difficulty.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Iron Sight Hero
achievements.description: Destroy all ten AA Guns on Captive City with an A-6E's unguided bombs on Hard or Ace difficulty.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Tiger Beats Fox
achievements.description: Shoot down a MiG-31 with an F-5E on Hard or Ace difficulty.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Ghost of Gaiuss
achievements.description: Gun kill two surface-to-surface missiles and shoot down four others with missiles with an F-16C on Wild Card on Hard or Ace difficulty.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Equilibrium
achievements.description: Shoot down three MiG-21s in one mission with a MiG-29A on Hard or Ace difficulty.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Hog Wild
achievements.description: Gun kill four Meson cannons without damaging any M.B.S.R.s on Atmos Ring with an A-10A on Hard or Ace difficulty.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Fish Out of Water
achievements.description: Shoot down four F-4Es in one mission with a MiG-21-93 on Hard or Ace difficulty.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Snake Eater
achievements.description: Gun kill both F-16Cs on Captive City with a Mirage 2000D on Hard or Ace difficulty.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Flying Rug
achievements.description: Gun kill two MiG-21s with an F-14D on Hard or Ace difficulty.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: G.D.S.O.B.
achievements.description: Buzz an enemy carrier's bridge at supersonic speed with an F-14D at less than 300 feet.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Loud and Proud
achievements.description: Destroy five land-based SAMs in one mission with a Tornado while the ECM pod is active on Hard or Ace difficulty.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Always a Bridesmaid
achievements.description: Shoot down all 18 enemy fighters on Alect Squdaron with an F-15E without being damaged on Hard or Ace difficulty.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Chew on That
achievements.description: Destroy a helicopter using only an air-to-ground munition with an F-15E on Hard or Ace difficulty.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Out Flanked
achievements.description: Shoot down both MiG-29As on Joint Operation with a Su-27 on Hard or Ace difficulty.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Old Man Strength
achievements.description: Destroy ten F-35s on Armada with an F/A-18E on Hard or Ace difficulty.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Surgical Strikes
achievements.description: Destroy all 12 radars on Offline with guided precision bombs with an F-117A without being damaged on Hard or Ace difficulty.
achievements.author: suspect15
